title: Doctor Site config locus fallback

authority_basis.source_context: operator identified root config.json as wrong Narada Site config locus

external_environment_changes.purpose: PowerShell-visible shim wrapper to repo-local node_modules/.bin/narada.ps1
cmd-visible shim wrapper to repo-local node_modules/.bin/narada.ps1
PowerShell-visible shim wrapper to repo-local node_modules/.bin/narada-mcp.ps1
cmd-visible shim wrapper to repo-local node_modules/.bin/narada-mcp.ps1

implementation.behavior: When the default operation config is absent and .narada/site.json exists beside it, doctor reports Narada Site seed posture instead of failing on the legacy operation config path.

terminal_claim: Narada proper doctor now resolves the Site seed config locus under .narada/site.json when root config.json is absent.
rollback: Revert doctor.ts and doctor.test.ts changes, remove this task/audit/ledger evidence, and remove optional user-local shim wrappers if desired.
